# Generated by Aether Engine — regenerated on every Compile; do not edit.
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16)
project(GameModule CXX)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
file(GLOB_RECURSE AE_SCRIPT_SOURCES CONFIGURE_DEPENDS
     ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/*.cpp)
add_library(GameModule SHARED ${AE_SCRIPT_SOURCES})
target_include_directories(GameModule PRIVATE "C:/Users/proprietaire/Documents/Fork/ChooseEngine/src")
target_link_libraries(GameModule PRIVATE "C:/Users/proprietaire/Documents/Fork/ChooseEngine/build/Release/AetherCore.lib")
if(MSVC)
    target_compile_options(GameModule PRIVATE /W3 /permissive- /MP)
endif()
foreach(cfg RELEASE DEBUG RELWITHDEBINFO MINSIZEREL)
    set_target_properties(GameModule PROPERTIES
        RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY_${cfg} "C:/Users/proprietaire/Documents/Fork/ChooseEngine/Templates/Sample/Binaries")
endforeach()
